expected_properties: When mul_en_in is deasserted, changes to mul_a or mul_b do not affect mul_out or mul_en_out.
additional_cases.goal: Confirm that disabling the input enable prevents any output activity despite input changes.
notes: Ensures that the design correctly gates pipeline registers with mul_en_in.
preconditions: Design is out of reset and any prior operation has completed.
stimulus_intent: Toggle mul_a and mul_b while mul_en_in=0 and verify outputs remain stable.
timing_assumptions: Allow sufficient cycles for any latent pipeline stages to settle after input changes.

expected_properties: Output enable follows input enable after an observable but unspecified latency.
When mul_en_out becomes high, mul_out reflects the product of the latched mul_a and mul_b.
baseline_case_enrichments.goal: Validate that a single multiplication operation propagates correctly to mul_en_out and mul_out after a conservative observation window.
notes: No assumption on exact pipeline depth; observation window extended until mul_en_out toggles.
Preserve ambiguity about latency as contract does not specify fixed cycles.
stimulus_intent: Drive a single valid multiplication request and monitor output enable and product.
timing_assumptions: Observe over multiple clock cycles until mul_en_out asserts, then capture mul_out.
